chapter_title.en: Chapter 36 – Earnings of the female hairdresser and the female circumciser

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/78)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/78)
text: دَخَلَتْ مَاشِطَةٌ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ لَهَا هَلْ تَرَكْتِ عَمَلَكِ أَوْ أَقَمْتِ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَنَا أَعْمَلُهُ إِلَّا أَنْ تَنْهَانِي عَنْهُ فَأَنْتَهِيَ عَنْهُ فَقَالَ لَهَا افْعَلِي فَإِذَا مَشَطْتِ فَلَا تَجْلِي الْوَجْهَ بِالْخِرَقِ فَإِنَّهَا تَذْهَبُ بِمَاءِ الْوَجْهِ وَ لَا تَصِلِي الشَّعْرَ بِالشَّعْرِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Ahmad Bin Asheym, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A female hairdresser went over to Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, so he<sup>saww</sup> said to her: ‘Have you left your work or are you still established upon it?’ So she said, ‘O Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>! I am doing it unless if you<sup>saww</sup> forbid me from it, so I shall keep away from it’. So he<sup>saww</sup> said to her: ‘So whenever you comb hair, do not polish the face with the rag, for it removes the water of the face, and do not attach the hair (of someone) with the hair (of another one)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn ’Ashaym from ibn abu ’Umayr from a man who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Once a hairdresser came to the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, and he asked her, ‘Have you stopped the work you were doing or not?’ She replied, ‘O Messenger of Allah, I still do it unless you prohibit. If so I will stop.’ He said, ’You can still do it but when doing a hair dressing do not clean the face with al-Khiraq (tatter); it takes away the beauty of the face, and do not connect someone else’s hair to another person’s hair.’”
